# Duraforge UK Ltd — Copilot Context & Instructions

> This file gives GitHub Copilot (and any AI assistant) the business context needed to
> generate relevant, accurate code, documents, and analysis for the Duraforge project.
> Keep this file updated as the business grows.

---

## 1. Who Is Duraforge?

**DURAFORGE UK LTD**
- Company No. **16679838**
- Registered address: **Swanscombe, Kent, DA10 1BZ**
- Incorporated: 2025/2026
- Business: Import and trade supply of **hydraulic seal kits** to UK businesses
- Supply chain: India → UK (Swanscombe, Kent) → trade customers
- Approved Indian suppliers: **Royal Composite**, **Deepkamal Motors**, **Max Spares**

Duraforge is a **B2B-only** operation. It does **not** sell to consumers. All customers are
professional trade: hydraulic repair shops, plant hire companies, agricultural dealers, and
construction plant teams.

---

## 2. What Duraforge Sells

Hydraulic seal kits for heavy machinery cylinders. The core product types are:

| Seal Type | Material Options | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Rod Seal / U-Cup (Head Seal) | NBR, PU | Most-replaced — prevents fluid leak on piston rod |
| Wiper / Scraper Seal | PU, NBR | Keeps contamination off rod |
| Piston Seal / T-Seal / Compact Seal | PTFE, PU | Seals piston inside bore |
| O-Ring & Static Seal | NBR, FKM | Port, end-cap and static sealing |
| Guide / Wear Ring | Nylon, PTFE | Prevents metal-to-metal contact |

### Material grades
- **NBR** — standard mineral oil, 60–70% of stock
- **PU (Polyurethane)** — high-cycle, abrasion-resistant, preferred for tracked excavators and telehandlers
- **PTFE** — piston seals (T-seal, compact); low friction, long life
- **FKM / Viton** — high temperature, fire-resistant hydraulic fluids; niche, high-margin

### Priority machine brand kits (Deepkamal price list, INR prices, ~£107/₹1)

| Kit | INR | ~GBP cost | UK sell price |
|---|---|---|---|
| JCB 3DX Boom 2010-11 (332Y6440) | ₹640 | ~£6 | £18–25 |
| JCB 3DX Dipper 2010-11 (332Y6462) | ₹689 | ~£6.44 | £20–28 |
| JCB 3DX Bucket 2010-11 (332Y6519) | ₹483 | ~£4.51 | £14–20 |
| JCB 3DX Stab (332Y5599) | ₹402 | ~£3.76 | £12–18 |
| JCB Universal Kit | ₹1,507 | ~£14 | £40–60 |
| Hyva FE-162-4 (tipper cylinder) | ₹3,122 | ~£29 | £85–120 |
| Hyva FE-141-3 | ₹2,123 | ~£20 | £60–85 |
| Hyva FE-120-3 | ₹1,899 | ~£18 | £55–75 |
| CAT 424B Boom 2012 (340-4687) | ₹703 | ~£6.57 | £20–30 |

Gross margin target: **150–300%** on standard kits. First shipment landed cost ~£4,700–5,000
targeting ~£10,000–14,000 sell-through value.

## 3. Target Customers & Geographies

### Primary region
**Kent → Surrey → Essex** (Swanscombe is central to the Dartford/M25/M2 corridor)

### Customer segments (priority order)

1. **Hydraulic Repair Specialists** — daily consumable buyers; highest value per account
   - Showan Hydraulics (Canterbury, 6,000+ stock lines)
   - Completely Hydraulic (Belvedere — 8 miles away; Harlow Essex HQ)
   - S&S Plant Ltd (Maidstone)
   - Emergency Site Services (Heathrow/Surrey, 24/7 mobile)
   - Pirtek Guildford

2. **Plant Hire Companies** — large fleets, in-house maintenance
   - H.E. Services (Strood HQ + Ashford, 3,500+ fleet items)
   - FGS Plant (Aylesford — full fleet analysis completed)
   - Skelton Plant Hire (Canterbury + Paddock Wood, 1,000 items)
   - CW Plant Hire (Ashford Kent + Basildon Essex)
   - Orbital Equipment (Waltham Abbey, 40 Kubota excavators)
   - CBL, Andrews Tipper Hire, Huws Gray (already visited)

3. **Agricultural dealers** — seasonal peak (harvest Aug–Oct); John Deere, Massey Ferguson dominant

4. **Construction plant teams** — Ebbsfleet Valley, Dartford, Medway corridor on doorstep

5. **Forklift service companies** — Dartford/Thurrock logistics hub (Toyota, Hyster, Yale)

### Sales proposition
- **25–30% below FPE Seals / Hallite** equivalent prices
- **Same-day delivery** within 30 miles (Swanscombe base)
- Local phone support — not a call centre
- Small quantities accepted (no MOQ)
- Cross-reference cards mapping Duraforge part numbers to FPE / Hallite / OEM refs

## 4. Key Machine & Cylinder Reference Data

### Most important cylinder dimensions to stock (P1 — Critical)

| Rod (mm) | Bore (mm) | Machine(s) | Position |
|---|---|---|---|
| 85 | 120 | Hyundai R210/R220 | Boom × 2, Bucket |
| 100 | 140 | Hyundai R210/R220 | Arm/Dipper |
| 70 | 130 | JCB 531-70, 532-70, 533-105 | Telehandler boom lift |
| 75 | 130 | JCB 535-95, 535-125 | Telehandler boom/tilt |
| 50 | 110 | JCB 531-70, 532-70 | Carriage tilt + sway |
| 55 | 100 | Takeuchi TB250 | Boom |
| 45 | 85 | Takeuchi TB230, TB325R | Boom + blade |
| 35 | 60 | Kubota KX016-4 | Arm + bucket |
| 57 | 102 | Bobcat E50Z/E55Z | Boom (imperial equiv.) |
| 30 | 60 | Kubota KX016-4 | Boom + blade |

### Cylinder rebuild kit standard contents (per cylinder)
Rod seal (U-cup) × 1 · Wiper seal × 1 · Piston seal × 1 · Guide/wear rings × 2
O-rings × 2–4 · Backup rings × 1–2

### Hyva tipper cylinder series (skip lorries, tipper trucks — very high demand in Kent/Essex)
`FE-110` · `FE-120` · `FE-129` · `FE-141` · `FE-149` · `FE-162` · `FE-169` · `FE-191` · `FE-207`

## 5. Operations & Logistics

| Topic | Detail |
|---|---|
| Storage | Garage at Swanscombe home address (startup phase) |
| Freight | Sea (LCL) via Felixstowe or Tilbury; ~20–28 day transit from India |
| Customs | EORI number required; customs broker/freight forwarder recommended |
| Tariff codes | HS 4016.93 (rubber seals) or HS 3926.90 (plastic seals) — verify per product |
| VAT | Voluntary registration recommended; use Postponed VAT Accounting (PVA) |
| Payment to suppliers | Wise Business or WorldFirst (0.5–1.5% vs bank SWIFT at 2–3%) |
| Incoterms | FOB preferred (Duraforge controls shipping from Indian port) |
| First shipment budget | ~£3,850 import cost; ~£4,700–5,000 landed total |

### Compliance checklist (pre-launch)
- [ ] EORI number (gov.uk/eori)
- [ ] VAT registration + Postponed VAT Accounting
- [ ] Product Liability Insurance (£1–5M minimum — mandatory before first sale)
- [ ] Public Liability Insurance
- [ ] Commercial stock/contents insurance for garage
- [ ] Customs broker appointed
- [ ] Accounting software: Xero/QuickBooks (MTD-compliant)
- [ ] Companies House Confirmation Statement due September 2026

---

## 6. Packaging & Labelling Standards

- **Individual seals**: Clear LDPE zip-lock bag (100+ micron), DURAFORGE label on front face
- **Seal kits**: All components in one bag + printed component checklist card inside
- **Label mandatory fields**: Company name, postal address, product description, dimensions (ID × OD × height mm), material, quantity, batch number, in English
- **Label recommended fields**: DURAFORGE part number, Shore A hardness, temp/pressure range, `Made in India`, cross-reference to FPE/OEM part number, QR code
- **Never include**: CE mark, UKCA mark, ISO 9001 reference (unless Duraforge holds it), "OEM Quality" / "Genuine" claims
- **Part number format**: `DRG-[Material]-[ID]-[OD]-[Height]` e.g. `DRG-PU-040-052-010`
- **Batch number format**: `IND-YYYY-MM-NNN` e.g. `IND-2026-04-001`
- Products must be **re-labelled in Duraforge packaging** before sale — never resell in Indian supplier packaging

## 7. Competitive Landscape

| Competitor | Weakness to exploit |
|---|---|
| FPE Seals (Darlington) | Remote — 1–2 day delivery to Kent; no local presence |
| Hallite Seals (Darlington) | Premium pricing; 40–60% above aftermarket |
| Parker Hannifin | OEM-channel focused; expensive |
| eBay / online | No technical support, no guaranteed quality, no urgent delivery |
| Completely Hydraulic | Also a potential **trade customer** — they source from FPE/Hallite |

## 9. Coding & Repository Conventions

- **Language**: Python 3.11 (virtual env at `.venv/`)
- **Activate venv**: `.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1` (PowerShell on Windows)
- **Install deps**: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
- **Skills folder** (`skills/`): Document reader utilities — `read_pdf.py`, `read_docx.py`, `read_excel.py`, `read_image.py`, `read_all_docs.py`
- **Docs folder** (`docs/`): Source business documents (PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, images)
- All scripts must handle **UTF-8 encoding** explicitly (`sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')`)
- Do not commit `.venv/`, `__pycache__/`, or `*.pyc` (covered by `.gitignore`)
- Repository: `amarjaiswal-devops/Duraforge` (private)

---

## 10. Important Business Rules for AI Assistance

When generating any content (documents, emails, scripts, analysis) for this repo:

1. **Identity is Duraforge UK Ltd** — not Royal Composite, not Deepkamal Motors, not Max Spares. Those are suppliers only.
2. All customer-facing content uses the Duraforge brand, address (Swanscombe, Kent DA10 1BZ), and contact details.
3. Sales pitches always lead with **25–30% below FPE/Hallite prices** and **same-day Kent delivery**.
4. Pricing is in **GBP (£)**. Indian INR costs are internal/reference only.
5. All B2B — never consumer language or consumer pricing platforms.
6. Cross-reference competitor part numbers (FPE, Hallite, JCB OEM, CAT OEM) wherever possible — it is the most commercially effective tool for trade customers.
7. Seal dimensions are always in **millimetres (mm)** — state rod diameter × bore diameter × height.
8. When writing seal kit specs, always include: rod seal, wiper seal, piston seal, guide rings, O-rings.
